subscriptions.monthly_hint: A one-time payment now. Each month we'll remind you to renew — there's no automatic charge.
subscriptions.success_hint: We'll remind you before it expires so you can renew in one tap.
subscriptions.toast_failed: Couldn't record your support. Please try again.
subscriptions.toast_cancelled: Support cancelled — access stays until the period ends.
subscriptions.editor_hint: Only people who support you monthly can read the full post. Others see the excerpt.
